trans-unit.source: Please select a page from the page tree to run the accessibility check.
trans-unit.target: Hitamo urupapuro mu giti cy'amapaji kugira ngo ukore igenzura ry'ubushobozi bwo kwinjira.

trans-unit.source: Run Accessibility Scan
trans-unit.target: Tangira Igenzura ry'Ubushobozi bwo Kwinjira

trans-unit.source: Scanning engine:
trans-unit.target: Uburyo bukoreshwa mu igenzura:

trans-unit.source: axe-core (recommended)
trans-unit.target: axe-core (birasabwa)

trans-unit.source: HTML CodeSniffer
trans-unit.target: HTML CodeSniffer

trans-unit.source: This module provides automated assistance for accessibility checks. It does not replace a full audit by qualified accessibility auditors, which is required to have a page officially certified as accessible.
trans-unit.target: Iki gice gitanga ubufasha bwikoranabuhanga mu igenzura ry'ubushobozi bwo kwinjira. Ntigisimbura isuzuma ryuzuye rikorwa n'abasuzumyi babifitiye ubushobozi, risabwa kugira ngo urupapuro rwemezwe ku mugaragaro nk'urushobora kwinjirwamo.

trans-unit.source: axe-core (recommended) checks the page against the WCAG accessibility guidelines — the standard that ensures people using screen readers, keyboard navigation, or other assistive technology can use your content. It is the actively maintained, industry-standard tool and produces very few incorrect warnings, so almost everything it reports is worth acting on.
trans-unit.target: axe-core (birasabwa) igenzura urupapuro ukurikije amabwiriza ya WCAG y'ubushobozi bwo kwinjira — ni sitandari yemeza ko abakoresha ibikoresho bisoma ku mwanya, uburyo bwo kuyoborwa na kibodi, cyangwa ikoranabuhanga rindi ryo gufasha bashobora gukoresha ibiri ku rupapuro rwawe. Ni igikoresho gikomeza kuvugururwa kandi gikoreshwa cyane mu nganda, kandi gitanga imenyekanisha ryinshi ryahenzwe rike, bityo hafi ya byose bitangazwa bikwiye gukorwaho.

trans-unit.source: HTML CodeSniffer checks the page against similar accessibility guidelines, but with an older, less refined method. It can occasionally point out issues axe-core misses, but it also produces many more results that need a closer manual look before you can tell whether something is really a problem. Use it only for a second opinion, not as your main scan.
trans-unit.target: HTML CodeSniffer igenzura urupapuro ukurikije amabwiriza asa n'ayo, ariko ikoresheje uburyo bwa kera, budasesuye neri. Rimwe na rimwe ishobora kugaragaza ibibazo axe-core idasanze, ariko itanga kandi ibisubizo byinshi bisaba kongera kubisuzuma n'amaso ku buryo bugoye mbere y'uko wemeza ko ikibazo koko gihari. Ikoreshe gusa nk'igitekerezo cya kabiri, ntabwo ikaba igenzura ryawe ry'ibanze.

trans-unit.source: Loading page and running scan…
trans-unit.target: Gupakira urupapuro no gukora igenzura…

trans-unit.source: Violations
trans-unit.target: Amakosa

trans-unit.source: Needs review
trans-unit.target: Bisaba isuzuma

trans-unit.source: Automated scanning could not determine whether these items pass or fail. Each one needs to be checked manually.
trans-unit.target: Igenzura ryikoranabuhanga ntiryashoboye kumenya niba ibi bintu byatsinze cyangwa byananiwe. Kimwe kimwe gisaba gusuzumwa n'amaso.

trans-unit.source: Passes
trans-unit.target: Byatsinze

trans-unit.source: No accessibility issues found.
trans-unit.target: Nta bibazo by'ubushobozi bwo kwinjira byabonetse.

trans-unit.source: Filters
trans-unit.target: Muyunguruzi

trans-unit.source: Severity:
trans-unit.target: Uburemere:

trans-unit.source: Critical
trans-unit.target: Bikomeye cyane

trans-unit.source: Serious
trans-unit.target: Bikomeye

trans-unit.source: Moderate
trans-unit.target: Bipfuye hagati

trans-unit.source: Minor
trans-unit.target: Bito

trans-unit.source: View
trans-unit.target: Kureba

trans-unit.source: For editors
trans-unit.target: Ku banditsi

trans-unit.source: For developers
trans-unit.target: Ku bakora porogaramu

trans-unit.source: The accessibility scan could not be completed. Please try again.
trans-unit.target: Igenzura ry'ubushobozi bwo kwinjira ntiryashoboye kurangira. Ongera ugerageze.

trans-unit.source: No preview URL available for this page. Ensure the page has a valid site configuration.
trans-unit.target: Nta rondamashusho (URL) riboneka kuri uru rupapuro. Genzura ko urupapuro rufite igenamiterere ry'urubuga ryemewe.

trans-unit.source: Add an image description (alt text) in the content element editor.
trans-unit.target: Ongeraho ibisobanuro by'ifoto (alt text) mu muhinduzi w'igice cy'ibikubiye.

trans-unit.source: This image is not linked to editable content, or its alt text is set but not rendered. Check the template's image rendering (developer task).
trans-unit.target: Iyi foto ntihuye n'ibikubiye bishobora guhindurwa, cyangwa alt text yayo yashyizweho ariko ntigaragazwa. Suzuma uburyo icyitegererezo kigaragaza amafoto (umurimo w'umukora porogaramu).

trans-unit.source: Add an alt text to the image input element in the content editor.
trans-unit.target: Ongeraho alt text ku gice cy'ifoto y'inyandiko mu muhinduzi w'ibikubiye.

trans-unit.source: This image input is not linked to editable content, or its alt text is set but not rendered. Check the template's rendering (developer task).
trans-unit.target: Iyi nyandiko y'ifoto ntihuye n'ibikubiye bishobora guhindurwa, cyangwa alt text yayo yashyizweho ariko ntigaragazwa. Suzuma uburyo icyitegererezo kigaragaza (umurimo w'umukora porogaramu).

trans-unit.source: Add alt text to the image map area in the content editor.
trans-unit.target: Ongeraho alt text ku gace k'ikarita y'ifoto mu muhinduzi w'ibikubiye.

trans-unit.source: This image map area is not linked to editable content, or its alt text is set but not rendered. Check the template's rendering (developer task).
trans-unit.target: Aka gace k'ikarita y'ifoto ntikahuye n'ibikubiye bishobora guhindurwa, cyangwa alt text yako yashyizweho ariko ntigaragazwa. Suzuma uburyo icyitegererezo kigaragaza (umurimo w'umukora porogaramu).

trans-unit.source: Edit the content element and change its Header Layout so heading levels don't skip a step.
trans-unit.target: Hindura igice cy'ibikubiye kandi uhindure Imiterere y'Umutwe kugira ngo urwego rw'imitwe rutasimbuka intambwe.

trans-unit.source: This heading is rendered by the page template rather than a content element. Adjust the heading structure in the Fluid template (developer task).
trans-unit.target: Uyu mutwe ugaragazwa n'icyitegererezo cy'urupapuro aho kuba igice cy'ibikubiye. Hindura imiterere y'imitwe mu cyitegererezo cya Fluid (umurimo w'umukora porogaramu).

trans-unit.source: A heading element is rendered with no text. Check the template's heading rendering; it should not output a heading tag when the source text is empty (developer task).
trans-unit.target: Igice cy'umutwe kigaragazwa kidafite inyandiko. Suzuma uburyo icyitegererezo kigaragaza imitwe; ntigikwiye gutanga akamenyetso k'umutwe igihe inyandiko y'inkomoko iri ubusa (umurimo w'umukora porogaramu).

trans-unit.source: Edit the link in the content editor and provide a descriptive link text.
trans-unit.target: Hindura umuyoboro mu muhinduzi w'ibikubiye kandi utange inyandiko isobanura umuyoboro.

trans-unit.source: This link is rendered by the page template without link text and isn't linked to editable content. Add visible text or an aria-label in the Fluid template (developer task).
trans-unit.target: Uyu muyoboro ugaragazwa n'icyitegererezo cy'urupapuro udafite inyandiko kandi ntuhuye n'ibikubiye bishobora guhindurwa. Ongeraho inyandiko igaragara cyangwa aria-label mu cyitegererezo cya Fluid (umurimo w'umukora porogaramu).

trans-unit.source: Update the table structure in the content editor to associate data cells with headers.
trans-unit.target: Vugurura imiterere y'imbonerahamwe mu muhinduzi w'ibikubiye kugira ngo uhuze utudirishti tw'amakuru n'imitwe.

trans-unit.source: This table is not linked to editable content. Update the table structure in the template so data cells reference their headers (developer task).
trans-unit.target: Iyi mbonerahamwe ntihuye n'ibikubiye bishobora guhindurwa. Vugurura imiterere y'imbonerahamwe mu cyitegererezo kugira ngo utudirishti tw'amakuru duhuze n'imitwe yatwo (umurimo w'umukora porogaramu).

trans-unit.source: Update the table in the content editor so header cells have associated data cells.
trans-unit.target: Vugurura imbonerahamwe mu muhinduzi w'ibikubiye kugira ngo utudirishti tw'umutwe dufite utudirishti tw'amakuru duhuye natwo.

trans-unit.source: This table is not linked to editable content. Update the table structure in the template so header cells have associated data cells (developer task).
trans-unit.target: Iyi mbonerahamwe ntihuye n'ibikubiye bishobora guhindurwa. Vugurura imiterere y'imbonerahamwe mu cyitegererezo kugira ngo utudirishti tw'umutwe dufite utudirishti tw'amakuru duhuye natwo (umurimo w'umukora porogaramu).

trans-unit.source: Add a main landmark element to the page template (developer task).
trans-unit.target: Ongeraho igice nyamukuru cya landmark mu cyitegererezo cy'urupapuro (umurimo w'umukora porogaramu).

trans-unit.source: Ensure all page content is contained within appropriate landmark regions in the template (developer task).
trans-unit.target: Genzura ko ibikubiye byose byo ku rupapuro biri mu turere twa landmark tubikwiriye mu cyitegererezo (umurimo w'umukora porogaramu).

trans-unit.source: Add a skip navigation link to the page template (developer task).
trans-unit.target: Ongeraho umuyoboro wo gusimbuka uburyo bwo kuyoborwa mu cyitegererezo cy'urupapuro (umurimo w'umukora porogaramu).

trans-unit.source: Set the lang attribute on the HTML element in the page template (developer task).
trans-unit.target: Shyiraho ikimenyetso lang ku gice cya HTML mu cyitegererezo cy'urupapuro (umurimo w'umukora porogaramu).

trans-unit.source: Use a valid BCP 47 language tag on the HTML element (developer task).
trans-unit.target: Koresha akamenyetso k'ururimi ka BCP 47 kemewe ku gice cya HTML (umurimo w'umukora porogaramu).

trans-unit.source: Adjust CSS color values to meet WCAG contrast requirements (developer task).
trans-unit.target: Hindura agaciro k'amabara ya CSS kugira ngo ahuze n'ibisabwa mu itandukaniro ry'amabara rya WCAG (umurimo w'umukora porogaramu).

trans-unit.source: Remove user-scalable=no from the viewport meta tag in the template (developer task).
trans-unit.target: Kuraho user-scalable=no mu kamenyetso ka meta ka viewport mu cyitegererezo (umurimo w'umukora porogaramu).

trans-unit.source: Add a title attribute to all iframe elements in the template (developer task).
trans-unit.target: Ongeraho ikimenyetso title ku bice byose bya iframe mu cyitegererezo (umurimo w'umukora porogaramu).

trans-unit.source: Make scrollable regions keyboard-accessible in the template (developer task).
trans-unit.target: Tuma uturere dushobora kuzenguruka dushobora kuboneka na kibodi mu cyitegererezo (umurimo w'umukora porogaramu).

trans-unit.source: Check Accessibility
trans-unit.target: Genzura Ubushobozi bwo Kwinjira

trans-unit.source: Check accessibility for this page
trans-unit.target: Genzura ubushobozi bwo kwinjira kuri uru rupapuro
